svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: The Evolution of Vision-Language Model Architectures
contrastive / bridged two-towers → LLM backbones → natively-fused inputs → omni-modal I/O → world-action models

g.text: bridged into a frozen LM (BLIP-2, Flamingo).
CLIP / ALIGN stop at alignment — no generative decoder
A pretrained LLM is the trunk; vision is added
via a projector that maps image tokens into it.
One transformer, early fusion of all modalities
on input. Output remains autoregressive text.
image / audio / video in → text out
Multimodal input AND output in one model via
decoder heads (image VAE / MMDiT / audio codec).
AR or discrete-diffusion over interleaved tokens
The trunk becomes a world model: it predicts
environment dynamics and acts, in one model.
closed loop: action in → next observation out
any modality in • any modality out
